title: mespilus crus-galli var. lucida
intro: Mespilus crus-galli var. lucida, also known as the Common Hawthorn, is a deciduous shrub or small tree that belongs to the rose family. It is widely used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and cardiotonic effects, helping to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. The health benefits of Mespilus crus-galli var. lucida include reducing symptoms of anxiety and stress, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being used in capsule or tablet form to make the most of its medicinal properties.
